query:
so.. am now focused on the maintenance tick corrections for HNSW alignment.. #444.  Review their proposed solution: Proposed Fix (architect-revised):                                            
                                                                               
  Tick ordering: prune → heal → graph compaction (prune must run before heal)  
                                                                               
  ┌──────────────┬─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐   
  │     Fix      │                         Change                          │
  ├──────────────┼─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
  │              │ Query embedding_dim=0 AND status=Active (+ active       │
  │ Heal pass    │ entries with embedding_dim>0 but not in HNSW index).    │
  │              │ Re-embed, cap at 20/tick. Write order: embed →          │   
  │              │ insert_hnsw_only → UPDATE embedding_dim.                │
  ├──────────────┼─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤   
  │              │ Query VECTOR_MAP rows for quarantined entries. Delete   │
  │ Prune pass   │ VECTOR_MAP row, call VectorIndex::remove_entry()        │   
  │              │ (IdMap-only, mark stale). Next compact() cleans the     │
  │              │ stale HNSW point.                                       │   
  ├──────────────┼─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
  │              │ TypedGraphState::rebuild() filters out Quarantined      │   
  │ Graph filter │ before build_typed_relation_graph(). Deprecated entries │
  │              │  retained (needed for Supersedes chain traversal).      │   
  ├──────────────┼─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
  │ Metric       │ Fast SQL COUNT in compute_report(): WHERE status=Active │
  │              │  AND embedding_dim=0. Score: 1.0 - (unembedded/active). │   
  ├──────────────┼─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
  │ Restore path │ restore_with_audit() must re-insert into HNSW when      │   
  │  (blocking)  │ !vector_index.contains(id) && embedding_dim>0. Without  │   
  │              │ this, a restored entry has no HNSW point after prune.   │
  └──────────────┴─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘   
                                                                  
  Design Review: APPROVED WITH NOTES

  - 1 blocking finding: restore_with_audit does not re-insert into HNSW after a
   status restore. Fix 2 (prune) makes this gap operational — must be fixed
  together.                                                                    
  - Non-blocking: embed→HNSW→DB write order; embed-service unavailability
  handling (skip+log); use mark-stale not immediate compact; filter all_entries
   consistently before graph builder.

entries.title: Maintenance tick must enforce VECTOR_MAP/HNSW/graph invariants — heal unembedded, prune quarantined
How to add a new maintenance tick pass to run_maintenance()
run_maintenance() tick order: prune → heal → compact (never reverse)
ADR-001 bugfix-458: GRAPH_EDGES compaction must filter on status != 3 (quarantined), not just entry existence
